commit.subject: LU-7632 kernel: kernel update RHEL7.2 [3.10.0-327.4.4.el7]
commit.message:
LU-7632 kernel: kernel update RHEL7.2 [3.10.0-327.4.4.el7]

Update RHEL7.2 kernel to 3.10.0-327.4.4.el7

Test-Parameters: clientdistro=el7 mdsdistro=el7 ossdistro=el7 \
  mdsfilesystemtype=ldiskfs mdtfilesystemtype=ldiskfs \
  ostfilesystemtype=ldiskfs testgroup=review-ldiskfs
